calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 PAIR H-credit x H-return (additivity cell): credit + return + pair vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 5/5, the mandated PAIR cell (user directive 2026-07-14: the gap has two plausibly-ADDITIVE halves -- credit-propagation H-credit + frontier-return H-return). Runs H-credit alone, H-return alone, AND the pair SAME-RUN on both reps so additivity/complementarity is directly READABLE, not inferred. Load-bearing DV = pair exceeds the better single by >= 1.0 resource/ep (complementarity), strict majority seeds, clears floor. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; sparse baseline same-run both reps. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: INV-089 harm-eval z_harm bound: target-corrected (prox) + IV/DV budget-decoupled redesign of starved 746b
items.note: Target-corrected + budget-decoupled redesign of V3-EXQ-746b (FAILed starved on PC_iv_moved: local-density IV onset gradient washed out). FIX A: PRIMARY gating target -> prox=harm_obs[center] (SD-010 harm-proximity label), the only collected target whose z_harm decodability genuinely grows with maturation AND survives adequate sampling (prox IV onset0->30: 0.705->0.829 at collect=14 AND 0.839->0.882 at collect=60; single-seed real-scale probe here +0.11 at collect=100). dens (confirmed sampling artifact) + realized-harm Y (flat) retained as reported NON-gating secondaries. READ-BACK CAVEAT: prox is the maturation label -> a prox PASS is a valid-but-softer bound existence proof (naive circularity broken by linear IV probe + fresh-init MLP DV on frozen z_harm). FIX B: decouple IV/DV data budgets -- collect one large pool (collect_episodes 60->100, ~1300 samples) then partition into DISJOINT IV-pool (~520) + DV-pool (~780) via fixed RNG, so neither leg underfits/overfits and C2 coupling is independent-sample. Falsifier readout: gating IV at FULL sampling + diagnostic small-n IV per target (mean_iv_delta_small) as the artifact contrast. RETAINED VERBATIM from 746b: DV-estimator fix (standardise target + K=5-fold + weight-decay/early-stopping + finite R2 floor -1) and PC_dv_estimator_ok rail. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (prox DV k-fold + decoupled-budget IV) absent from all recorded manifests (746a/b computed only dens/at/next DV on a shared budget) -> run. Re-derive brake: 1 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsy on INV-089 (the 746b starve) < threshold 2 -> NOT braked; NO substrate build owed (SD-010 HarmEncoder + harm_eval_z_harm IMPLEMENTED). Mints its own reuse-eligible frozen prefix (collect_episodes changed; include_driver_script_in_hash=False). claim_ids=[INV-089]; experiment_purpose=evidence; supersedes nothing; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING (a PASS moves INV-089 provisional toward stable via governance). Smoke: dry-run PASS + real-scale single-seed probe PASS (prox IV+0.11 full-sampling, prox DV 0.93, all primary preconditions clear).
